sectorNodes.name: Port Sable
sectorNodes.description: A rusted trade station built into a canyon asteroid. Smuggling, debt, bad coffee, and bad decisions.

sectorNodes.name: Scavenger's Wake
sectorNodes.description: Your patched-together modular smuggler vessel. It doubles as camp, sanctuary, and rolling problem magnet.

sectorNodes.name: Ember Hollow
sectorNodes.description: A mining moon where plasma dust storms strip skin and truth in equal measure.

sectorNodes.name: Glassreef
sectorNodes.description: A flooded pre-collapse city whose dead transit grid still hums under brine.
